title: polygala serpyllacea subsp. ciliata
intro: Polygala serpyllacea subsp. ciliata, also known as ciliate polygala, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Polygalaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its ability to tonify the spleen and strengthen the body's resistance to disease. The health benefits of Polygala serpyllacea subsp. ciliata include its potential to improve fatigue, boost the immune system, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and made into a tea, or combined with other herbs in a formula to enhance its medicinal properties.
